npcs.name: Bank Clerk
npcs.description: A helpful bank clerk who manages deposits and withdrawals

nodes.text: Welcome to the bank! How may I help you today?

responses.text: I'd like to access my bank.

nodes.text: Of course! Your items are safe with us.
We offer secure item storage. Your items will be safe here indefinitely!

npcs.name: Shopkeeper
npcs.description: A friendly merchant who buys and sells items

nodes.text: Welcome to my shop! I have the best prices around!
Take a look at what I have in stock!
I sell weapons, armor, and potions. I also buy items from adventurers!

npcs.name: Goblin
npcs.description: Small green humanoids with crude weapons. The classic first enemy.

npcs.name: Desperate Bandit
npcs.description: Humans who turned to crime after the Calamity

nodes.text: Hand over your gold or face the consequences!
Smart choice. Now get out of here!

npcs.name: Quest Giver
npcs.description: A mysterious figure with tasks for brave adventurers

nodes.text: Greetings, adventurer! I have a task for you.
I need someone to help protect our town from the growing threats.
That remains to be seen, adventurer.

npcs.name: Skill Trainer
npcs.description: A master craftsman who can teach you new skills

nodes.text: Ready to learn? Practice makes perfect!
Let me show you the way.
I can teach you combat skills, crafting, and resource gathering techniques.

npcs.name: Barbarian Warrior
npcs.description: Primitive humans living in the wilderness

npcs.name: Corrupted Guard
npcs.description: Former kingdom soldiers serving dark masters

npcs.name: Dark Warrior
npcs.description: Warriors who embraced darkness after the Calamity

npcs.name: Black Knight
npcs.description: Elite dark warriors in pitch-black armor

npcs.name: Ice Warrior
npcs.description: Ancient warriors of Valorhall, frozen but still fighting

npcs.name: Dark Ranger
npcs.description: Master bowmen who turned to darkness

metadata.structure: Standardized NPCData with unified structure for all NPCs
